title: alternanthera serpens
intro: Alternanthera serpens, also known as serpent's tail or red calico, is a species of flowering plant in the amaranth family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Alternanthera serpens include reducing inflammation and fever, as well as treating skin conditions and wounds. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine.
